get.summary: Public pre-auth bootstrap: OIDC availability, setup state, and the workspace name (null before setup).

post.summary: Password login. With two-factor on, the password earns a five-minute mfa_token instead of a session; finish at /auth/login/totp.
Request a password reset link. Always 204 so account existence never leaks; rate limited per email and per IP.
Complete a password reset with a token from the reset email. Revokes every session of the user.

get.summary: Operational status (admin): version, uptime, database size and backup snapshots where the host can know them, blob capacity, and queue depths by status.

post.summary: Send a test email to the calling administrator's own address, proving the configured mail transport end to end. 409 when email is not configured or the transport refuses the message.

get.summary: The stored SMTP settings (password masked) and the active mail posture with its source: admin settings, the environment, or none.

put.summary: Replace the stored SMTP settings (admin, session auth only). An omitted pass keeps the stored secret. Stored settings take precedence over the environment.

delete.summary: Remove the stored SMTP settings and fall back to the environment (admin, session auth only).

post.summary: Begin TOTP enrolment (session auth only). Inactive until a code is verified.

delete.summary: Deactivate your own account (password-confirmed, plus a code when two-factor is on). Sessions and API tokens die; an admin can re-enable it. The last active admin cannot deactivate.

200.description: Project event stream (SSE). A connection without Last-Event-ID is a new subscriber: it receives a single stream.cursor event naming the newest event id and no history. Send that id back as Last-Event-ID to receive everything after it.

post.summary: Set a completed image upload as the project cover. The picture is not registered as an asset.

get.summary: Pictures uploaded as covers for this project.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Query text, at least two characters.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: all (default), assets, comments, projects, people, or shares.

get.summary: Share viewer roster (share owner or project manager). The viewer_key is never on the wire.

post.summary: Add assets to an existing share. Assets already in it are skipped.

200.description: Signed URL for the playable rendition

202.description: The share is watermarked and the burned rendition for the current spec is not registered yet; poll until 200. The clean proxy is never served.

get.summary: Share download, gated by allow_download: none is 403, proxy signs the 1080p proxy (or the burned watermarked rendition; the clean file is never handed to a watermarked share), original signs the original blob with an attachment disposition.

202.description: The watermarked rendition is still being prepared; poll until 200.

post.summary: Create a transfer link: a package sends existing assets, a request receives files into a folder.
Signed download for one package file, original bytes.

get.summary: The whole package as one streamed zip (store method, exact length known upfront).

post.summary: Verify and land a received upload: the file becomes an asset in the request's folder.

200.description: Idempotency-Key replay: the original still-open session

get.summary: The whole share as one streamed zip, under the share's download policy. Watermarked shares refuse.

parameters.name: share_id
parameters.description: Filter to the assets in one of this project's shares.

put.summary: Set a completed image upload as this asset's thumbnail, overriding the generated poster wherever the asset is shown, share rooms included.

delete.summary: Drop the chosen thumbnail; the generated poster stands again.

get.summary: The chosen thumbnail image, or 404 when none was chosen.

post.summary: Attach a completed upload as the next version of an asset. The new version becomes current; carry_forward copies unresolved comments from the previous current version.

get.summary: Signed download for a version: kind=original (editor) or kind=proxy (viewer).
A folder, a selection, or the whole project as one streamed zip of originals (editor).

parameters.name: folder_id
parameters.description: Limit to one folder and its subfolders.

put.summary: Upload a WebVTT caption track (editor+), one per language, replace on re-put. Raw text/vtt body; ?language=<BCP 47>&label=<name>. This is the deployment captioning hook: a curl away.

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: BCP 47 tag like en or pt-br. Defaults to en.

parameters.name: label
parameters.description: Menu label. Defaults to the language tag.
